Uses of Interface
com.irurueta.geometry.estimators.AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimatorListener

  • Packages that use AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimatorListener 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry.estimators
    This package contains classes to estimate basic geometric structures

    • Uses of AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimatorListener in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators

      Fields in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators declared as AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimatorListener AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimator.mListener
      Listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes.
      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry.estimators that return AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimatorListener 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimatorListener AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimator.getListener()
      Returns reference to listener to be notified of events such as when estimation starts, ends or its progress significantly changes

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static PlaneCorrespondenceAffineTransformation3DRobustEstimator PlaneCorrespondenceAffineTransformation3DRobustEstimator.create​(AffineTransformation3DRobustEstimatorListener listener)
      Creates an affine 3D transformation estimator based on plane correspondences and using default robust estimator method.

      Creates an affine 3D transformation estimator based on 3D line correspondences and using default robust estimator method.
